title: ClearTick
body:
**ClearTick** is a Fabric modpack built exclusively for performance, stability, and responsiveness. It improves Minecraft’s FPS, reduces lag, lowers memory usage, **and smooths overall performance without changing vanilla gameplay, mechanics, or visuals**. Every mod included in ClearTick serves a single purpose: measurable performance improvement. **No vanilla-plus features, no quality-of-life tweaks, and no behavioral changes.** ClearTick targets **Minecraft 1.21.11 and newer** and follows a rapid update policy. Mods are updated as soon as stable, compatible versions are available. When a new Minecraft version releases, any incompatible mod is temporarily removed or replaced to preserve stability and vanilla behavior. All mods are evaluated and tested before inclusion. ClearTick is ideal for players who want true vanilla Minecraft, but optimized, whether on low-end hardware, high-end PCs, large worlds, or servers. The goal is simple: make Minecraft faster and smoother while remaining completely invisible during gameplay. ClearTick includes the following mods:
  • Alternate Current
  • BadOptimizations
  • Better Block Entities
  • Cloth Config
  • Clumps
  • Concurrent Chunk Management Engine
  • Dynamic FPS
  • EntityCulling
  • Fabric API
  • Fabric Language Kotlin
  • Fast IP Ping
  • FerriteCore
  • Fzzy Config
  • ImmediatelyFast
  • Ixeris
  • Language Reload
  • Lithium
  • Mod Menu
  • ModernFix
  • More Culling
  • NoisiumForked
  • Particle Core
  • Reese's Sodium Options
  • ScalableLux
  • ServerCore
  • Sodium
  • Sodium Extra
  • Very Many Players
